description: Model Context Protocol is an open standard and documentation site for connecting AI applications to external tools, resources, and prompts. The site publishes the MCP specification, implementation guides, examples, and related extension documentation.
summary: modelcontextprotocol.io exposes public MCP documentation servers at `https://modelcontextprotocol.io/mcp` and `https://mcp.main-kill-isr.mintlify.me/mcp`, plus example/catalog MCP server endpoints under `example-server.modelcontextprotocol.io`; no REST, GraphQL, or first-party CLI surface was documented on the given domain.

surfaces.name: Model Context Protocol docs MCP server
Model Context Protocol docs MCP server (Mintlify host)
